sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.description: Primary presenting concern in the patient's own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.description: Onset, duration, character, severity, associated symptoms, prior workup, response to prior interventions

sections.title: Review of Systems
sections.description: Symptoms across constitutional, cardiovascular, pulmonary, GI, GU, endocrine, hematologic, neurologic, psychiatric systems

sections.title: Past Medical & Surgical History
sections.description: Active and historical conditions, surgical history, transplants, current medications, allergies

sections.title: Vital Signs
sections.description: Vitals literally observed on a monitor or read aloud

sections.title: Physical Examination
sections.description: System-specific findings as directly observed during the exam

sections.title: Investigations & Labs Reviewed
sections.description: Labs and imaging literally observed on screen — values, modality, findings as described aloud only

sections.title: Assessment
sections.description: Working diagnosis or differential as explicitly stated — no inference

sections.title: Plan
sections.description: Investigations ordered, medication adjustments, specialist referrals, admission decisions, follow-up timeline as stated
